Issues: Lack of unique artistic style: The image falls into a highly saturated and generic category of 'cityscape at sunset.' While aesthetically pleasing, it lacks a distinct, unique artistic signature that would make it stand out in a crowded stock image market.

Low commercial differentiation: Many similar sunset/cityscape images are available. Without a specific niche or high-concept theme (e.g., 'Cyberpunk Noir,' 'Neo-Tokyo Dusk'), the image struggles to attract buyers seeking highly specific visual concepts.

Generic composition: The composition is strong but relies on standard photographic/digital techniques. To increase commercial appeal, more innovative lighting or abstract interpretation would be required.

Potential IP concerns (if AI-generated): If the image was generated by an AI model, there are ongoing commercial licensing disputes regarding the ownership and commercial rights of the output, which could pose a risk to selling the image commercially.
